title: AP2 (Agent Payments Protocol) v0.1 Extension
description: AP2 extension type definitions for agent-to-agent commerce capabilities. Aligned with the official google-agentic-commerce/AP2 Python SDK. Extension URI: https://github.com/google-agentic-commerce/ap2/tree/v0.1

Ap2Role.description: Roles that agents can fulfill in the AP2 ecosystem. Every agent that supports AP2 MUST perform at least one role.

ContactAddress.description: A physical address following the W3C Contact Picker API. See: https://www.w3.org/TR/contact-picker/#contact-address

PaymentCurrencyAmount.description: A monetary amount with currency code following W3C Payment Request API. See: https://www.w3.org/TR/payment-request/#dom-paymentcurrencyamount

PaymentItem.description: An item for purchase and the value asked for it. See: https://www.w3.org/TR/payment-request/#dom-paymentitem

amount.description: The monetary amount of the item.

pending.description: If true, indicates the amount is not yet final.

refund_period.description: The refund duration for this item, in days.

PaymentShippingOption.description: A shipping option with its cost. See: https://www.w3.org/TR/payment-request/#dom-paymentshippingoption

PaymentOptions.description: Options controlling what payer information to collect. See: https://www.w3.org/TR/payment-request/#dom-paymentoptions

PaymentMethodData.description: A supported payment method and its associated data. See: https://www.w3.org/TR/payment-request/#dom-paymentmethoddata

supported_methods.description: A string identifying the payment method (e.g., 'CARD', 'google-pay').

PaymentDetailsModifier.description: A price modifier that applies when a specific payment method is selected. See: https://www.w3.org/TR/payment-request/#dom-paymentdetailsmodifier

supported_methods.description: The payment method ID this modifier applies to.

total.description: Overrides the original item total for this method.

additional_display_items.description: Additional line items for this payment method.

data.description: Payment method-specific data for the modifier.

PaymentDetailsInit.description: Details of the payment being requested. See: https://www.w3.org/TR/payment-request/#dom-paymentdetailsinit

id.description: Unique identifier for this payment request.

display_items.description: Line items to display to the user.

modifiers.description: Price modifiers for particular payment methods.

PaymentResponse.description: Indicates the user has chosen a payment method and approved a payment request. See: https://www.w3.org/TR/payment-request/#paymentresponse-interface

request_id.description: Unique ID from the original PaymentRequest.

method_name.description: Payment method chosen by the user.

IntentMandate.description: A user's purchase intent with constraints and requirements. Created by a shopping agent and sent to a merchant agent via an A2A Message with data key 'ap2.mandates.IntentMandate'.

user_cart_confirmation_required.description: If false, the agent can make purchases without further user approval. Must be true if the mandate is not signed by the user.

natural_language_description.description: Natural-language description of the user's intent, confirmed by the user.

merchants.description: Merchants allowed to fulfill the intent. If unset, any merchant is acceptable.

skus.description: Specific product SKUs. If unset, any SKU is allowed.

requires_refundability.description: If true, purchased items must be refundable.

intent_expiry.description: When this intent expires, in ISO 8601 format.

CartContents.description: The detailed contents of a cart. Merchants MUST NOT produce a CartMandate until all required payment-impacting information has been collected.

user_cart_confirmation_required.description: Whether the merchant requires user confirmation before purchase.

payment_request.description: W3C PaymentRequest containing items, prices, and accepted methods.

cart_expiry.description: When this cart expires, in ISO 8601 format.

CartMandate.description: A cart whose contents have been digitally signed by the merchant. Returned as an A2A Artifact with data key 'ap2.mandates.CartMandate'.

merchant_authorization.description: Base64url-encoded JWT digitally signing the cart contents with the merchant's private key. Includes cart hash, timestamps, and unique identifier to prevent replay attacks.

PaymentMandateContents.description: Core payment authorization data inside a PaymentMandate.

payment_mandate_id.description: Unique identifier for this payment mandate.

payment_details_id.description: Reference to the payment request identifier.

payment_response.description: The user's chosen payment method and details.

PaymentMandate.description: User's instructions and authorization for payment. Sent via an A2A Message with data key 'ap2.mandates.PaymentMandate'.

user_authorization.description: Base64url-encoded verifiable credential presentation binding the user to the cart and payment mandate hashes.

merchant_confirmation_id.description: Transaction confirmation ID at the merchant.

psp_confirmation_id.description: Transaction confirmation ID at the PSP.

network_confirmation_id.description: Transaction confirmation ID at the network.

PaymentReceipt.description: Information about the final state of a payment. Exchanged via a data part with key 'ap2.PaymentReceipt'.

payment_mandate_id.description: Reference to the processed payment mandate.

timestamp.description: When the receipt was created, in ISO 8601 format.

Ap2DataPart.description: An A2A data part containing an AP2 payload. The 'data' field should contain one of the mandate/receipt types with the appropriate key.

data.description: Contains AP2 data with keys: 'ap2.mandates.IntentMandate', 'ap2.mandates.CartMandate', 'ap2.mandates.PaymentMandate', 'ap2.PaymentReceipt', or 'risk_data'.

Ap2ExtensionParameters.description: Extension parameters for the AgentExtension.params field when declaring AP2 support. At least one role is required.

roles.description: The roles this agent performs in the AP2 model.

RiskData.description: Optional implementation-specific risk signals. Structure is defined by implementers.
